title: Water Supply Interruption – Tank Cleaning
body: The overhead water tank is scheduled for its mandatory cleaning on 13th April 2026. Water supply will be temporarily suspended from 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM. Residents are requested to store adequate water in advance.

title: Special General Meeting – 5th April 2026
body: A Special General Meeting (SGM) is called on 5th April 2026 at 6:30 PM at the Community Hall. All owner members are requested to attend. Agenda will be circulated separately.

title: Maintenance Fee Due – April Quarter 2026
body: This is a gentle reminder that the maintenance fee for the April–June 2026 quarter is now due. Kindly make your payment at the earliest via UPI or bank transfer. Refer to the Pay Maintenance section for account details.
